问题导向/挑战陈述句式: However, obtaining the shape of glossy objects like metals, plastics or ceramics remains challenging, since standard Lambertian cues like photo-consistency cannot be easily applied.
Inferring the depth of transparent or mirror (ToM) surfaces represents a hard challenge for either sensors, algorithms, or deep networks.
However, real-world LF images often encounter reflective and transparent surfaces and the related regions contain depth information from the reflection and background layers...
对比/转折句式: However, most current depth estimation methods support only Lambertian scenes, making them unreliable for glossy surfaces.
On the one hand, the definition of depth itself might appear ambiguous in such cases... On the other hand, as humans can deal with this through experience...
In contrast, our model can work on general 1-lobe BRDFs, and can also recover reflectance in addition to shape...
方法提出/贡献陈述句式: In this paper, we derive a spatially-varying (SV)BRDF-invariant theory for recovering 3D shape and reflectance from light-field cameras.
In this paper, we propose a novel decoupling-and-aggregating strategy and develop a dual-layer depth estimation network for LF images with complex reflections.
Purposely, this paper proposes a simple yet effective strategy for obtaining training data and, thereby, dramatically boosting the accuracy...

段落开头常用的引入方式: 背景引入/现象描述：从宏观背景或日常现象切入，如'Light-fields implicitly capture...'或'In our daily lives, we often interact with...'。
转折/问题引入：使用转折词直接点出当前技术的痛点，如'However, most current depth estimation methods...'或'Unfortunately, light reflection and refraction...'。
主题句直接引入：在Related Work中直接使用小标题或领域名称开头，如'Monocular Depth Estimation. Early methods used...'。
段内论证逻辑: 现象/背景 -> 存在的问题/挑战 -> 现有方法的局限性 -> 本文的动机/解决方案。
列举现有工作 -> 分析其缺陷（如假设不成立、对噪声敏感、缺乏Ground Truth等） -> 引出本文方法的优势与创新点。
段落结尾常用的收束方式: 总结本文方法的优势/独特贡献：如'...which has not been achieved by previous light-field shape acquisition approaches.'
引出下文或具体章节：如'We adopt this strategy in our final optimization procedure.'或'...which is discussed in Sec. 4.1.'
强调问题的必要性或现有方法的失效后果：如'...leading to the wrong depth estimation results of most existing depth estimation algorithms.'

用词特征: 过渡词：However, Moreover, Therefore, In contrast, Specifically, On the one hand / On the other hand, In short, Purposely, Additionally, Nonetheless.
强调词：explicitly, dramatically, remarkably, extensively, significantly, solely, typically, necessarily, properly.
限定词：primarily, mostly, often, usually, generally, up to, at least, in many instances, very few.
学术动词/短语：derive, propose, demonstrate, validate, address, leverage, violate, encounter, model as, fine-tune, decouple, aggregate, unveil, infer.
论证模式: 提出问题 → 分析现有方法局限 → 提出本文方案 (Problem -> Limitation -> Solution)：引言部分先强调任务重要性，再指出透明/反光表面导致的现有方法（如Lambertian假设）失效，最后提出本文的特定网络或策略。
总述贡献 → 分点详述 (General -> Specific)：在Introduction末尾，先用一段话总述本文提出的核心算法或理论，随后使用编号列表（1, 2, 3...）清晰列出具体贡献和对应章节。
现象描述 → 理论/物理分析 → 算法设计 (Phenomenon -> Theory -> Algorithm)：先描述反光/透明表面的物理现象（如EPI交叉、高光伪影），然后推导数学方程或建立双层混合模型，最后基于此设计解耦或聚合模块。
相关工作分类综述 → 指出研究空白 (Categorized Review -> Research Gap)：在Related Work中按子领域分类介绍，每段末尾通过转折词指出该领域未解决的问题，从而精准定位本文的研究空白。

引用的嵌入方式: 句末引用 (End-of-sentence)：最常用，用于支持前面的陈述或集中列举相关文献。如'...remains challenging for both computer vision algorithms and deep networks [64].'或'...work poorly on glossy surfaces [9, 13, 15, 25, 29, 30, 31].'。
句中/主语引用 (In-text/Subject)：将作者或特定方法作为句子主语，突出具体学者的工作。如'Tao et al. [27] proposed a clustering method...'或'The method by Johnson and Adelson [14] can estimate shape...'。
括号内补充引用 (Parenthetical)：跟在特定名词、数据集或设备名称后作为补充说明。如'...commercial light-field cameras (e.g. Lytro [1] and Raytrix [22])...'。
引用与论述的衔接方式: 批判性衔接：引用后紧跟转折词指出其不足或假设的局限性。如'Tao et al. [27] proposed... However, they attempt a binary classification... which cannot handle...'。
归纳性衔接：将多篇文献归纳为某一类方法，随后进行整体评价。如'Many depth estimation methods... have been proposed [9, 13...]. However, most of them rely on...'。

继承/对比性衔接：说明本文方法与引用方法的理论渊源或差异。如'...and follow the shape estimation framework... proposed by Chandraker [5, 6, 7]. We then show that in the case of light-fields, shape cannot be directly recovered using [5, 6, 7].'。
